_comment: Relative likelihoods for the random wait pool played by matrix_express("wait") and presence_set(intent:"working"). Higher = more likely; any variant not listed defaults to 1; 0 disables it. With the two below, wait-rainbow shows 4/(4+1) = 80% of the time and the working snake 20%. Read at RUNTIME, so edits take effect on the next wait with no rebuild and no reconnect. Ships as the default preference; adjust freely.
